name: Drive HTML Viewer
description: Google Drive에서 HTML 파일을 렌더링된 페이지로 자동 표시합니다

content_security_policy.sandbox: sandbox allow-scripts allow-forms allow-popups allow-modals; default-src 'self' https: data: blob:; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' 'unsafe-eval' https: data: blob:; child-src 'self' https: data: blob:; frame-src 'self' https: data: blob:; connect-src https: data: blob:; img-src * data: blob:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https: data: blob:; font-src 'self' https: data:; media-src https: data: blob:; object-src 'none';
